channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Huawei promises up to 90:1 compression technology by using a proprietary dynamic algorithmic technique and a lot of SSDs
item.description: Huawei unveiled a compression card combining proprietary algorithms and SSD infrastructure to achieve claimed reductions reaching 90:1 under ideal conditions.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Saturday, June 27 (game #1615)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Saturday, June 27 (game #1112)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Saturday, June 27 (game #846)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: New agentic memory framework uses 118K tokens per query. LangMem burns through 3.26M.
item.description: Long-horizon reasoning exposes a core weakness in AI agents: context windows fill up fast, and retrieval pipelines return noise instead of signal.To solve this, researchers at the National University of Singapore developed MRAgent, a framework that abandons the static "retrieve-then-reason" approach. Instead, it uses a mechanism that allows an agent to dynamically develop its memory based on accumulating evidence. This multi-step memory reconstruction is integrated into the reasoning process of the large language model (LLM). While not the only framework in this space, MRAgent significantly re...

item.title: My favorite Govee smart lamps are at their lowest prices ever for Prime Day
item.description: We’ve already rounded up the best Philips Hue deals of Prime Day, but if you’re looking for something a little more budget-friendly, Govee’s latest sale is worth checking out. The company has heavily discounted several of its color-changing smart lamps, including the Table Lamp 2 ($53.99, down from $79.99), Floor Lamp Basic ($59.99, regularly $99.99), the […]...

item.title: After covering Prime Day for 36 hours over four days, this is the one thing I bought
item.description: We’ve covered so many deals during Prime Day that my head is spinning. But after four days of doing our damndest to try and help folks save money, the thing I’m most hyped for is a simple tool for fixing my most egregious mistakes. I bought a pair of Vampliers. If you’re unfamiliar, Vampliers are […]

item.title: Prime Day Deal 2026: Fellow Espresso Series 1 Is $200 Off
item.description: This is the last day for deals on Fellow Series 1 espresso machine, Fellow Aiden, and Fellow Stagg kettle. Each is the best in their category.

item.title: Corgi, the buzzy Y Combinator-backed insurance tech startup, says it didn’t steal an open source product
item.description: Corgi became embroiled in controversy when Papermark accused it of stealing its software. Corgi says it did not, raising new questions about vibe coding.

item.title: Best Prime Day Vacuum Deals Offer Up to 42% Off (2026): Shark, Dyson, Bissell
item.description: Move over, spring cleaning. These vacuum deals will give your home the cleanest summer yet thanks to Amazon Prime Day.

item.title: Quote of the day by Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang: 'People talk about AI reducing jobs — complete nonsense' — pushing back against automation fears
item.description: Automation has long been considered a threat to jobs and employment, but not everybody agrees – least of all those architecting the AI buildout

item.title: It's your last chance to save on Lego Star Wars sets this Prime Day, including R2-D2, C-3PO, and Chopper
item.description: Prime Day is almost over, but you can still save on some of the best Lego Star Wars sets, including R2-D2, C-3PO, Chopper, battle packs, and starfighters.

item.title: Get lifetime access to ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and more for $70
item.description: 1min.AI gives you lifetime access to GPT, Gemini, Claude, and more

item.title: The Invite review: Olivia Wildes sex comedy is outrageous fun
item.description: Olivia Wilde's sex comedy, "The Invite," is outrageous fun. Review.

item.title: You can still buy Beats, Sony, and Sennheiser headphones for under $100 before Prime Day ends
item.description: Amazon Prime Day 2026 is almost over, but there's still time to grab these Apple, Sony, Sennheiser, and Beats headphones for under $100.

item.title: Prime Day just slashed OLED TV prices to Black Friday lows —save up to $1,600 from Samsung, LG, and Sony
item.description: This year's Prime Day OLED TV deals are better than Black Friday, and I'm rounding up the best deals, with up to $1,600 off from Samsung, Sony, and LG.

item.title: How to watch FIFA World Cup 2026 in Spain (for FREE)
item.description: How to watch World Cup 2026 in Spain – for free with out handy streaming trick

item.title: Cassey Ho tells Mashable her biggest advice for content creators
item.description: Mashable spoke with Blogilates founder Cassey Ho at VidCon 2026 as one of the inductees of the Hall of Fame.

item.title: The Best Prime Day Laptop Deals on My Personal Favorites
item.description: From MacBooks to gaming laptops, these are the very best deals on some of my very favorite laptops for Amazon Prime Day.

item.title: Prime Day 2026 live: Join us for the final countdown as we vet deals in real-time
item.description: Get live updates as Prime Day 2026 draws to a close on June 26. We're still looking for deals on Apple iPads, Bose headphones, and OLED TVs.

item.title: Michelle Phan tells Mashable how much VidCon has changed since she first attended
item.description: Mashable spoke with YouTuber and EM cosmetics founder Michelle Phan at VidCon 2026 as one of the inductees of the Hall of Fame.

item.title: Our favorite Prime Day gadgets under $100 you don’t need but will really want
item.description: Prime Day has a funny way of convincing you to buy things you weren’t shopping for in the first place. You sign on intending to buy something sensible you actually need, like a pack of USB-C cables, and an hour later you’ve also added a gadget that can press your coffee maker’s power button and […]

item.title: It's your last chance to get record-low prices on Amazon Fire TV Sticks — plus a huge sale on Amazon's answer to Samsung's The Frame art TV
item.description: Don't miss lowest-ever prices on Fire TV Sticks, or on the new Ember Artline TV.

item.title: This is your last chance to get the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra for under $1,000
item.description: You can still save $380 on the unlocked Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra for Prime Day, but the deal could disappear by June 27.
